hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. bụ ụlọ ọrụ teknụzụ zuru ụwa ọnụ nke dị na Sarajevo, na-enye ngwọta ngwanrọ dị elu na ụlọ ọrụ gafee kọntinent atọ.

mission.title: Ozi
mission.description: Anyị na-enyere ndị otu aka ịtụgharị echiche dị oke egwu ka ọ bụrụ ngwaahịa dijitalụ a pụrụ ịdabere na ya nke na-emepụta uru azụmahịa a pụrụ ịtụle.
points: Kwekọọ na nnyefe teknụzụ na nsonaazụ azụmahịa doro anya.
Wulite usoro ogologo oge nke na-anọgide na-enwe ike ịnọgide na-enwe ike ịnọgide na-enwe ka ndị otu na-abawanye.
Soro ndị metụtara ya na-arụkọ ọrụ ọnụ site na atụmatụ site na igbu egbu.

expertise.title: Ọkachamara
expertise.description: Ndị otu anyị dị iche iche na-ejikọta omimi injinia na echiche ngwaahịa gafee teknụzụ ọgbara ọhụrụ.
points: Enterprise-ọkwa web na ikpo okwu engineering.
Igwe ojii, akpaaka DevOps, na akụrụngwa na-agbanwe agbanwe.
Etinyere AI / ML, ọrụ data, na ngwaahịa ndị enyere IoT.

approach.title: Ụzọ
approach.description: Anyị na-eme ihe nlereanya doro anya, iterative nke na-eme ka nnyefe bụrụ amụma mgbe ọ na-ebelata ihe ize ndụ ngwaahịa.
points: Chọpụta: kọwaa oke, ihe ndị dị mkpa, na ihe ịga nke ọma n'oge.
Wuo: ụgbọ mmiri na-elekwasị anya increments na na-aga n'ihu nzaghachi loops.
Nyochaa: nyochaa nsonaazụ ma melite arụmọrụ ka oge na-aga.

cta.title: Njikere ịgbanwe azụmahịa gị?
cta.description: Jikọọ na ndepụta na-eto eto nke ụlọ ọrụ ndị tụkwasịrị obi na Horizon Tech iji nyefee ngwọta ọhụụ na nsonaazụ pụrụ iche.
cta.secondary: Lelee akụkọ ihe ịga nke ọma

hero.title: Kpọtụrụ anyị
hero.description: Ị nwere atụmatụ ọ bụla n'uche? Ọ ga-amasị anyị ịnụ n'ọnụ gị. Lelee otu anyị nwere ike isi nyere gị aka mee ka echiche gị dị ndụ.

email.title: Email
email.description: Zitere anyị email n'oge ọ bụla.

form.title: Zitere anyị ozi
form.success: Ana m ekele gị nke ukwuu maka ozi gị. Anyị ga-alaghachikwute gị n'ime awa 24-48.
form.error: E nwere ihe na-ezighị ezi. Biko gbalịa ọzọ ma ọ bụ zitere anyị email ozugbo.

placeholders.message: Gwa anyị banyere ọrụ gị ma ọ bụ ajụjụ gị.

validation.email: Biko tinye adreesị ozi-e ziri ezi.
validation.messageMinLength: Ozi ahụ ga-enwerịrị ma ọ dịkarịa ala mkpụrụedemede {{count}} ogologo.

contact.reasonsTitle: Gịnị mere anyị ji arụ ọrụ?
reasons: AI / ML na igwe ojii architecture ọkachamara
Mmepe Agile na nkwurịta okwu doro anya

custom.title: Ngwọta Omenala
custom.description: Na-achọ ihe ngwọta dị iche iche? Anyị na ndị ahịa na-arụkọ ọrụ ọnụ iji ghọta mkpa pụrụ iche ma nyefee ngwanrọ omenala nke na-ebute nsonaazụ a pụrụ ịtụle.

faq.title: Nwere ajụjụ ndị ọzọ?
faq.description: Lelee ngalaba FAQ anyị maka azịza ngwa ngwa

hero.description: Otu dị iche iche nke ndị na-ahụ maka teknụzụ, ndị na-emepụta ihe, na ndị na-eme atụmatụ na-ewu ngwaahịa dijitalụ dị elu ọnụ.

section.title: Ndị otu ndị isi
section.description: Ndị isi nwere ahụmahụ na-eduzi ọhụụ na uto nke Horizon Tech

hamza.bio: Onye ndu ọhụụ na onye na-ese ụkpụrụ ụlọ na afọ 10 + na ngwanrọ ụlọ ọrụ, ọkachamara na AI / ML, nyiwe igwe ojii, na usoro ngwaahịa na-agbanwe agbanwe.

ahmet.bio: Ọkachamara cybersecurity lekwasịrị anya na ụlọ ọrụ nchebe ụlọ ọrụ, akụrụngwa nchekwa, na nnyefe mbụ maka gburugburu ebe obibi.

culture.title: Ndụ na Horizon Tech
culture.description: Anyị na-akwalite omenala nke ihe ọhụrụ, imekọ ihe ọnụ, na mmụta na-aga n'ihu

remoteFirst.title: Omenala Dịpụrụ Adịpụ
remoteFirst.description: Na-arụ ọrụ site na ebe ọ bụla na-agbanwe agbanwe ma na-elekwasị anya na nsonaazụ, ọ bụghị ọnọdụ.

collaborative.title: Gburugburu ebe obibi
collaborative.description: Ihe omume otu oge niile, nnọkọ ịkekọrịta ihe ọmụma, na mmekorita cross-function.

workLife.title: Ọrụ-Ndụ Itule
workLife.description: Iwu ezumike na-emesapụ aka, nkwado ahụike uche, na nkwanye ùgwù maka oge onwe onye.

innovation.title: Oge Innovation
innovation.description: 20% oge maka ọrụ nkeonwe, hackathons, na ịchọpụta teknụzụ ọhụrụ.

cta.title: Chọrọ isonyere ndị otu anyị?
cta.description: Anyị na-achọ mgbe niile ndị nwere nkà na-eche banyere nka, nwe, na ihe ọhụrụ.

hero.description: Jikọọ na otu ndị injinia na-ewu ngwanrọ ngwanrọ maka ndị ahịa zuru ụwa ọnụ. Na-arụ ọrụ dịpụrụ adịpụ, na-eto eto mgbe niile, ma na-enwe ezigbo mmetụta.

process.title: Usoro ịkwụ ụgwọ anyị
process.description: Na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma, na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma ma na-akwanyere oge gị ùgwù.

steps.title: Tinye
steps.description: Daalụ maka arịrịọ gị, anyị ga-enyocha ya n'ime ụbọchị azụmahịa 3.

steps.title: Mbido nkata
steps.description: A na-akpọ oku vidiyo nkeji 30 iji kwurịta ahụmịhe gị na atụmanya gị.

steps.title: Nka na ụzụ
steps.description: Ajụjụ ọnụ teknụzụ ma ọ bụ mmega ahụ bara uru iji gosipụta nkà gị.

steps.title: Onyinye
steps.description: Zute ndị otu ahụ ma nata onyinye gị iji sonyere Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Mepee ebe
jobs.description: Chọta ohere gị ọzọ ma sonyere ndị otu anyị na-eto eto
jobs.unavailable: A naghị anabata arịrịọ n'oge a.

listings.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
listings.description: Wulite ngwa ụlọ ọrụ na-agbanwe agbanwe site na iji React, Node.js, na teknụzụ igwe ojii.

listings.title: Injinia DevOps
listings.description: Chepụta ma debe pipeline CI / CD, akụrụngwa dị ka koodu, na usoro nlekota oru.

listings.title: Injinia AI / ML
listings.description: Zụlite ụdị mmụta igwe na ngwọta AI maka ndị ahịa ụlọ ọrụ.

listings.title: Onye na-emepụta ngwaahịa
listings.description: Mepụta ahụmịhe onye ọrụ mara mma, nke nwere kensinammuo maka ngwa ụlọ ọrụ dị mgbagwoju anya.

listings.title: Ngwọta Architect
listings.description: Mepụta ngwọta teknụzụ njedebe na njedebe ma duzie ndị ahịa site na mgbanwe dijitalụ.

listings.title: Onye edemede teknụzụ
listings.description: Mepụta akwụkwọ zuru ezu, nkuzi, na ọdịnaya teknụzụ.

cta.title: Ajụjụ gbasara ịrụ ọrụ ebe a?
cta.description: Ọ ga-amasị anyị ịnụ n'ọnụ gị. Daalụ maka ịza ajụjụ ọ bụla gbasara ndụ na Horizon Tech.

hero.description: Chọpụta otu anyị si nyere ụlọ ọrụ gafee ụlọ ọrụ aka ịgbanwe arụmọrụ site na teknụzụ bara uru, nke nwere mmetụta dị elu.

items.title: Mbugharị igwe ojii na mmezigharị
items.description: Kwagara usoro ụlọ akụ nketa na akụrụngwa igwe ojii AWS na-enweghị oge efu.
items.challenge: Ihe nketa monolithic architecture na-akpata nsogbu scalability
items.result: Ịga nke ọma na-akwaga na microservices na AWS

items.title: AI-kwadoro Diagnostic Platform
items.description: Wuru ụdị ML maka nyocha onyonyo ahụike na 95% + ziri ezi.
items.challenge: Usoro nyocha ntuziaka na-ewe ogologo oge

items.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Mepụtara BI ikpo okwu nhazi 10M + ihe omume kwa ụbọchị.
items.challenge: Enweghị ezigbo oge visibiliti n'ime isi metrik azụmahịa
items.result: Real-oge nchịkọta na nghọta n'elu ikpo okwu

cta.title: Njikere ide akụkọ ihe ịga nke ọma gị?
cta.description: Ka anyị leba anya n'otú anyị nwere ike isi nyere gị aka inweta nsonaazụ yiri nke ahụ ma jiri ntụkwasị obi mee ihe.

filters.title: Ụlọ ọrụ nzacha
filters.empty: Enweghị ọmụmụ ihe kwekọrọ na nzacha ụlọ ọrụ ahọpụtara.

hero.description: Nkuzi teknụzụ, nghọta ụlọ ọrụ, na nkuzi bara uru site na ezigbo ọrụ nnyefe.

faqs.question: Kedu ọrụ Horizon Tech na-enye?
faqs.answer: Anyị na-enye mmepe ngwanrọ omenala, ngwọta AI / ML, igwe ojii, DevOps, ọgụgụ isi azụmahịa, na ọrụ IoT.

faqs.question: Kedụ ka m ga-esi malite ọrụ na Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Kpọtụrụ anyị site na ụdị ma ọ bụ email na mkpa gị. Anyị ga-ahazi oku nchọpụta ma kesaa aro.

faqs.question: Ị na-enye nkwado na nlekọta na-aga n'ihu?
faqs.answer: Ee. Anyị na-enye nkwado na ngwugwu mmezi nke gụnyere ndozi ahụhụ, mmelite nchekwa, na ndozi atụmatụ.
